data.title: Merging RLBWTs adaptively
data.description: We show how we can merge two run-length compressed Burrows-Wheeler Transforms (RLBWTs) into a run-length compressed extended Burrows-Wheeler Transform (eBWT) in space and time, where and are the lengths of the uncompressed strings, is the number of runs in the final eBWT and is the sum of the longest common prefix (LCP) values at the beginnings of those runs.
